notes: Added a dedicated presentations segment without changing the overall CSV schema.
Technical sentry/wixpress emails were filtered out; only outreach-safe emails remain in final outputs.
Contact-page fallback was reduced from many guessed URLs to a single conservative fallback to lower 404/403 noise.
Business Presentations agencies were folded into the presentation_design bucket in service-type stats.
Deckez was added as a source but did not yield a final contact row in the latest pipeline run.
